title: OR Core+ (Only For OriginRealms MC Server)
description: OR Core+ is a modpack for Origin Realms designed to enhance gameplay and improve the overall player experience. It features popular mods like Sodium, Fabric, Fresh Animations, Easy Item List, and many more.
body:
OR Core+ is a custom modpack built for Origin Realms, designed to enhance gameplay and elevate the overall player experience. Featuring popular mods like Sodium, Fabric, Fresh Animations, Easy Item List, and many more, OR Core+ transforms how you play Origin Realms. With a wide range of quality-of-life improvements, performance tweaks, and visual enhancements, this modpack is tailored to fit the unique style of Origin Realms while making your gameplay smoother and more immersive.

Features
Smoother animations
Tons of performance optimizations
Resource packs and shaders that match the Origin Realms aesthetic
Lots of quality-of-life features
...and more!

Join The Discord For 🩵Support & 📢Updates and send us your 💜feedbackJoin The Discord For Support & 📢Updates and send us your 💜feedback
